title: Anthropic OAuth Credential File
description: Shape of ~/.claude/.credentials.json. Read by both Claude Code and this scraper. Either may rewrite it; atomic rename is required.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived refresh token. SECRET — never logged.

expires_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds at which access_token expires. The scraper refreshes when expires_at <= now().

scopes.description: Pass-through; not interpreted by the scraper.
